mapper.select: select af.af_id as id, af.tel_id as telId, gc.city_id as cityCode, gc.city_name as cityName, gp.province_name as provinceName, af.estimated_grade as aqiValue, concat(af.af_date, ' ', af.af_time) as feedbackTime, af.state as state, af.gm_id as gmId, gm.gm_name as gmName, concat(af.assign_date, ' ', af.assign_time) as assignTime, af.information as remark from aqi_feedback af left join grid_city gc on af.city_id = gc.city_id left join grid_province gp on af.province_id = gp.province_id left join grid_member gm on af.gm_id = gm.gm_id where af_id=#{afId}
